name: one-resume
author: Vincenzo Rippa
description: Document pipeline for CV / projects résumés (a CV may embed a projects section): markdown → typed data via @one-resume/parser → Typst PDFs (@one-resume/pdf) + ATS DOCX (@one-resume/docx); the api serves the merged site content JSON. External paths are env-configurable — see .env.example.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/parser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/pdf/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/docx/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit
